response.justification: James has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for a Staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Proven ability to lead technical projects across diverse stacks and deliver production systems
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
Lack of demonstrated enterprise cloud AI deployment experience (AWS/GCP/Azure used but not in GenAI context)
Education shows BS in CS but no advanced degree, and GenAI experience appears limited to recent role
